step_rationale: Platelet collagen receptor (GPVI paralog); directly mediates platelet adhesion and aggregation.
mechanism: Integrin mediating platelet adhesion to collagen on exposed vessel wall; critical for thrombus formation.

references.title: Potential Clinical Value of Biomarker-Guided Emergency Triage for Thoracic Aortic Dissection.
Characterization of the platelet transcriptome by RNA sequencing in patients with acute myocardial infarction.
Prothrombotic gene polymorphisms and plasma factors in young North Indian survivors of acute myocardial infarction.
